hero.name: Lynn Nam
hero.tagline: 用形态与材质，让科技变得可被触摸。
hero.focus: 智能穿戴 · 机器人 · 电子产品 ID · CMF

intro.enLead: Lynn Nam is a product / industrial designer based in Shenzhen, focused on smart wearables, CMF, robotics, and consumer electronics.
intro.enDetail: She connects visual design with manufacturing feasibility — from concept development to supplier samples and mass-production refinement.
intro.zh: Lynn Nam 是一名在深圳工作的产品 / 工业设计师，专注智能穿戴、CMF、机器人与消费电子产品设计，擅长在外观美学、用户体验与量产可行性之间建立平衡。
intro.kr: Lynn Nam은 선전에서 활동하는 제품 / 산업 디자이너로, 스마트 웨어러블, CMF, 로봇 및 소비자 전자제품 디자인에 집중하고 있습니다.

work.title: Projects
work.subtitle: Smart wearables · CMF · Robotics · Consumer electronics

contact.availability: Available for product / industrial design opportunities
